# example_function_simple (Function)

## Example Usage

### Basic

The basic call.

```terraform
example_function_simple(...)
```

### Complete

The complete call.

```terraform

```

## Signature

```text
example_function_simple(bool Boolean,string String,number Number,int32 Int32,int64 Int64,float32 Float32,float64 Float64,dynamic Dynamic,list List,set Set,map Map,object Object,strings String...) Boolean
```

## Arguments

1. `bool` (Boolean, Nullable, Unknownable) A bool parameter.

	Validators:

	- Value must be "true".
1. `string` (String) A string parameter
1. `number` (Number) A number parameter
1. `int32` (Int32) A int32 parameter
1. `int64` (Int64) A int64 parameter
1. `float32` (Float32) A float32 parameter
1. `float64` (Float64) A float64 parameter
1. `dynamic` (Dynamic) A dynamic parameter
1. `list` (List) A list of string parameter.
1. `set` (Set) A set of string parameter.
1. `map` (Map) A map of string parameter.
1. `object` (Object) An object parameter. See the nested schema [here](#nested--object).
1. `strings` (String) The variadic string parameter.
